title: [Goal] Add docs-handler.js route handler
description:
## Description

Created packages/core/src/vite/docs-handler.js — a server-side Vite dev-server route handler that serves README.md and source code files for a docs viewer. Implements three GET routes: /readme, /source, and /files with path-traversal security checks.


---
_Managed by clips • Goal ID: #g013_
